category_sources: Official Kyoto Cabinet page describes a key-value DBM-style database library.
source_facts.description describes a library for managing a database.
display_name_sources: Official dbmx.net Kyoto Cabinet page uses the Kyoto Cabinet display name.
docs_sources: Official Kyoto Cabinet page lists project documents, fundamental specifications, and command-line utility specifications.
repo_sources: Official Kyoto Cabinet page provides source packages but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official Kyoto Cabinet page describes DBM records as key-value pairs and documents bundled command-line utilities.
